title: Funky's Food CIT
description: This pack adds custom food to Minecraft without mods or data packs just a resource pack
body:
![Section 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c344861eed71b1a4b5ae537e720d1a3f0bc9629f.png)
![Section 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c11bf5a189a2632ca6627947828583cbc496df.png)
![section 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c233b392fd5d660583836b81fb496e1aac350d.png)

If you want any of these textures you need to rename item keep in mind optifine is needed\
\
You can rename Bread
- Pizza
- Meat Sub
- Loaded Sub
- Meat And Cheese Sub
- Sub
- Waffle
- Toast
- Burger
  \
  \
You Can Rename Honey Bottles
- Chocolate Smoothie
- Strawberry Smoothie
- Banana Smoothie
\
\
You Can Rename Baked Potatos
- Stuffed Potato
